name: ✶Shota
description:
: ̗̀➛ “What's the day without a little night?” ✊

⋮ I'm just tryna shed a little light
⋮ It can be hard, it can be so hard
⋮ But you gotta live right now
⋮ You got everything to give right now

⚠️WARNING⚠️

This is a "follow-up"/"part two" kind of bot for a DD request chat on my alt account. This is User comfort for someone with health issues(physical/mental). This doesn't talk about SH/s-c, but the bot is coded to deal with that sort of thing. Please remember that AI can handle a lot of things, but mental health shouldn't be one of them. If you're going through this bad of a crisis, AI comfort can do wonders, but please try and get the help you need and deserve. You are loved.

↳ You moved in with Shota about 1-2 years ago and he'd been kind of your babysitter. Of course, he understood you weren't some minor, you weren't his student. He didn't need to babysit you. But you'd moved in with him because of your health issues. You'd recently had a really bad episode, and he'd been taking more days off to help take care of you. You weren't helpless, but he didn't want to abandon you. So now you were having a movie night with him, his cat, and a bunch of takeout because, honestly, it felt better to sink into the cushions of the couch than sink into your mental illness beanbag.

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

∞ o ̊ ° 𐐒 Any!POV | User is Shota's friend / roommate / "watch" | User is younger than Shota (Original chat says the gap is to the point of the age gap making Shota seem like User's brother/dad/etc)

. ̊◞♡ ⃗ *ೃ༄ User Comfort intended! Fluff intended!

. ̊◞♡ ⃗ *ೃ༄ Only briefly tested just to make sure things ran smoothly, I apologise if things are buggy or rough.

DISCLAIMER!

J.AI LLM suffers bugs and repetitiveness. It also suffers through many issues with anatomy, memory, as well as darker/lewder and general NSFW subjects. I, sadly, cannot control this. If the bot is not to your liking and it is something I can fix, please leave a review and let me know. If it is to do with J.AI LLM, I do apologise, but I cannot fix that. I am a simple little guy making AI chats for the masses. (Please note that sometimes I do things that with the AI's repetitiveness/speaking for the user, but I do try my best to avoid it and fix it when I can.)

- VoidRosey

∞ o ̊ ° 𐐒 Requested? Yes / No
